prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次依次约369→441→531→406→460名，整体呈波动走势。2024年位次明显前移至406名后，2025年小幅后移至460名，近两年均值约433名，2025年基准位次460名；该校在贵州省理科/物理类计划数：2021年53人、2022年62人、2023年62人、2024年56人、2025年56人；2026年物理类计划50人，较2025年减少6人（缩招约10.7%），缩招幅度较大，竞争有所加剧，位次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2021年第5名、2022–2026年均为第6名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及食堂管理舆情（999元帝王蟹事件），但属偶发事件，对整体报考热度影响有限；抖音热度排名第17（高热），短视频平台关注度较高，反映考生对该校持续保持高关注。历史投档异常方面，2022年曾因专业组投档线差异引发讨论，但未见明显断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，南京大学有26个A-及以上学科，其中天文学、地质学、大气科学、中国语言文学、外国语言文学、物理学、化学、计算机科学与技术、环境科学与工程、工商管理为A+，学科实力极为突出，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、人工智能、电子信息等热门专业持续高热，与南京大学强势学科高度契合；贵州省2026年考生总数约299000人，按近年物理类占比约69.7%估算，物理类考生约20.8万人，较2025年物理类20.7万人基本持平；南京大学位于江苏省南京市，属华东地区，对贵州省考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在贵州招生计划相对稳定，未发现明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动（2025年基准460名）、2026年物理类缩招约10.7%（竞争加剧，位次前移）、学校顶尖层次（软科第6名）及高抖音热度。缩招是影响2026年位次的最关键因素，位次前移约30名；考生总数基本持平、声誉舆情影响有限。预测最低位次约430名，区间380–480名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 369 → 441 → 531 → 406 → 460, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, the ranking significantly advanced to 406, then slightly retreated to 460 in 2025, with a two-year average of about 433. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 460. The enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou Province's science/physics category: 53 in 2021, 62 in 2022, 62 in 2023, 56 in 2024, 56 in 2025; for 2026, the physics category plan is 50, a decrease of 6 compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 10.7%). This is a relatively large reduction, intensifying competition and putting pressure on rankings to advance.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 5th in 2021 and 6th from 2022 to 2026, consistently among the top universities in China, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a cafeteria management incident (the 999 yuan emperor crab incident), but this is an isolated event with limited impact on overall application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 17th (high heat), indicating high attention on short video platforms, reflecting sustained high interest from candidates. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2022, there was discussion due to differences in admission scores across major groups, but no significant gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Nanjing University had 26 disciplines rated A- or above, including Astronomy, Geology, Atmospheric Science, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science and Technology, Environmental Science and Engineering, and Business Administration as A+, showcasing extremely strong academic strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information continue to be highly sought after, aligning well with Nanjing University's strong disciplines. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000. Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 69.7%, the estimated number of physics category candidates is about 208,000, roughly the same as the 207,000 in 2025. Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the East China region, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Guizhou candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou is relatively stable, with no significant changes in regional preference observed.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations (baseline 460 in 2025), the approximately 10.7% reduction in physics category enrollment in 2026 (intensified competition, ranking advancement), the university's top-tier status (6th in Soft Science), and high Douyin popularity, the enrollment reduction is the most critical factor affecting the 2026 ranking, advancing it by about 30 places. The total number of candidates is roughly stable, and the reputation incident has limited impact. The predicted minimum ranking is about 430, with a range of 380–480.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (Zhicheng Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (Zhicheng Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Kuang Yaming College, General Science Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Software Engineering (Intelligent Software/Software Business Innovation Class)
- Electronic Information
- Computer Science and Technology (Computer Finance Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematical and Physical Sciences)
- Science Experimental Class (Earth Sciences and Resources and Environment)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Life Sciences).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 380–480, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 380), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Artificial Intelligence Zhicheng Class and Computer Science Zhicheng Class. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (400–450), prioritize Tier 2 majors like Software Engineering and Electronic Information. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 480), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 Science Experimental Classes to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 97 → 103 → 97 → 127 → 128, stable around 100 from 2021 to 2023, then significantly shifted back to 127–128 in 2024–2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 30 positions in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 128. The university's planned enrollment in Guizhou for liberal arts/history category: 11 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 19 in 2024, 20 in 2025; 26 in 2026 for history category, an increase of 6 (30% expansion) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that eases competition and puts pressure on rankings to shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked 6th nationally by Soft Science, a top comprehensive university with outstanding liberal arts strength (Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Languages and Literatures A+, Philosophy A, Law A, etc.). In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (cafeteria public opinion), but it is an isolated incident with limited impact on liberal arts admissions. Douyin popularity ranking 17th (high heat), overall high attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there was discussion in 2022 due to differences in major group admission lines, but no obvious gaps. Nanjing University's liberal arts advantages are prominent: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Languages and Literatures A+, Philosophy A, Law A, Sociology A, Business Administration A+, etc., strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Traditional liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature have stable popularity. The Economics and Management Pilot Class (Digital Intelligence Economy and Management) is an interdisciplinary direction with high popularity. In 2026, the estimated number of history category candidates in Guizhou is about 90,600, roughly the same as 2025's 90,100. Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Guizhou candidates. The history category enrollment plan has been continuously expanding (from 11 in 2021 to 26 in 2026), reflecting the university's emphasis on Guizhou liberal arts students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the historical trend of ranking backward shift (baseline 128 in 2025), the significant 30% expansion in history category in 2026 (easing competition, ranking backward shift), and the university's top tier. Expansion is the most critical factor affecting 2026 rankings, with a backward shift of about 23 positions. The total number of candidates is roughly unchanged. The predicted minimum ranking is about 151, with a range of 101–201.
